Ian Byrne

Member of Parliament for Liverpool West Derby

About
About

News

News from Liverpool West Derby and updates on my work in Parliament representing our wonderful constituency.

Hillsborough Law Now Campaign

I am immensely proud to be the Parliamentary lead of this campaign. Find out more.

Grow West Derby

Get involved & learn about Grow West Derby.
Support our community to grow food, learn new skills and be part of a transformative community project.

#RightToFood Campaign

The fight to make sure nobody goes hungry
